name: Mr. Swimmer
overview: Genius swimmer Bai Yongze comes from a humble background, while wealthy Song Chacha's life turns upside down after her family falls from grace. When her boyfriend, Lan Tian—Yongze’s best friend—suddenly breaks up with her, the two men become rivals, competing in both love and career.

trailers.title: Mr Swimmer 游泳先生 Official Trailer
